/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gbemu.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gbemu.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbemu.dir/vk_frontend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbemu.dir/vulkan_renderer.cpp.o -o gbemu  ../core/libgbemu_core.a ../common/libgbemu_common.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so
